creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: After review D41641 (see also bug 273373) the fix here can be dropped as the error won't be reproducible: <sys/timerfd.h> -> <sys/proc.h> (no longer included) -> <sys/ucred.h> -> <bsm/audit.h> -> <sys/param.h> -> error. Renaming upstream may still be useful: glibc and musl (unlike bionic) also have NOFILE in <sys/param.h>.
